share-tech-mono.description: Primary display and heading font — used for all headings (H1–H3), section labels, and branded text. Monospace aesthetic gives the UI a technical, crypto-native feel.

inter.description: Primary body font — used for body text, labels, metadata, descriptions, button labels, and all general UI text.

ibm-plex-mono.description: Code and data font — used for displaying code snippets, hex values, cryptographic keys, and technical data.

roboto-mono.description: Alternative monospace font — used for numeric displays, countdowns, and tabular data where fixed-width alignment matters.

system-sans-serif.description: System fallback — used when custom fonts are unavailable or for OS-native UI elements.

h1.description: H1 Heading — largest display text for page titles and hero sections

h2.description: H2 Section Header — section-level headings and card group titles

h3.description: H3 Card Title — card headings, dialog titles, and sub-section labels

base.description: Body text — standard paragraph and UI text

small.description: Small — labels, metadata, secondary info, and helper text

section-label.description: Section label — uppercase category headers with tracking (Background Colors, Blue Scale, Typography, Status, etc.)

overline.description: Overline — small uppercase labels like 'IGLOO UI' branding text

code-value.description: Code value — hex values, token names, technical annotations
